zh.Broadwinsor Liberty, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特布洛阿德文索 利波迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gregory Hutchins於1536年出生在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文索 利波迪時，他的父親John Howchyns31歲，母親Joane Wright26歲。他於1570年與Anna Maria Lawrence在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1616年在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文德索享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gregory Hutchins于1536年出生在英国多瑟特布洛阿德文索 利波迪时，他的父亲John Howchyns31岁，母亲Joane Wright26岁。他于1570年与Anna Maria Lawrence在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1616年在英国多瑟特布洛阿德文德索享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hutcheon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Houchin .

variants.name: Hutcheon
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Angus): variant of   Houchin  .

variants.name: Hutchings
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hutchins  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Gregory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Latin Gregorius from the post-classical Greek name Gregōrios ‘watchful’ (a derivative of gregōrein ‘to watch, be vigilant’). The name was a very popular one among the early Christians, who were mindful of the injunction ‘be sober, be vigilant’ (1 Peter 5:8). It was borne by a number of early saints. The most important, in honour of whom the name was often bestowed from medieval times onwards, were Gregory of Nazianzen ( c.329–90 ), Gregory of Nyssa ( d. c.395 ), Gregory of Tours ( 538–94 ), and Pope Gregory the Great ( c.540–604 ). A famous bearer of the name in modern times is the film star Gregory Peck ( 1916–2003 ). The name has traditionally been popular in Scotland, where it is often found in the form Gregor .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Gregory Hutchins was born in 1536, in Broadwinsor Liberty, Dorset, England, his father, John Howchyns, was 31 and his mother, Joane Wright, was 26. He married Anna Maria Lawrence in 1570, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1616, in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England, at the age of 80.

ko.lifeSummary: John Gregory Hutchins(이)가 1536년 영국 도르세트 브로드윈소르 리버티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Howchyns(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Wright(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1570년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Anna Maria Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1616년 영국 도르세트 브로드윈드소르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
